relationships.evidence: We follow the evaluation protocol from (Veluri et al., 2024) and conduct a human study involving 25 annotators with native-level English proficiency... we use a 5-point Likert scale to evaluate the Naturalness (N-MOS) of turn-taking and the Meaningfulness (M-MOS) of the generated dialogue content.
